name: sakenowa-mcp-vercel
description: Vercel deploy wrapper for @yawaragi/sakenowa-mcp — exposes the MCP streamable-HTTP endpoint as a Next.js Pages-API function, suitable for Vercel serverless.

pnpm.//: Build-script approval lives in pnpm-workspace.yaml's allowBuilds field. Shai-Hulud quarantine isn't applied here — the wrapper has six well-established prod deps and the Vercel project is rebuilt only on manual git push, so the attack surface is narrow.
